Okay how does Angelica grow into a

choices: Doesn’t work as fast as Angelica hoped

113232.content:
Perhaps it was Angelica’s raising by her mom
Perhaps it was just that Angelica was mean and
more than a little spoiled but either way a
Pickles family outing would end in an
unexpected way!


It all started when the Pickles family
Thanks to Stu and Cindy ( Angelica’s Mom )
The family was invited to a lab of sorts for a
tour and business related reasons.

Why they brought the kids who knows
but Angelica got bored and separated.
Then Angelica overheard some careless
scientists.


They had made a growth serum.
Sure it was stored in baby bottles
which Angelica found a bit embarrassing but
this was too good for her to pass up.


Angelica’s mind went wild at the possibilities!
She could become big, not just big
she could be big enough to disobey her
parents, big enough to be president,
Big enough to do whatever she wanted
no matter what!

She could be the biggest thing in
the world or even a queen!

Angelica wasted no time and emptied her
backpack.
Then she found her doll Cynthia.


“I’m sorry Cynthia but I need all the room
in the backpack I can get for operation
Queen Angelica”


She tossed the doll aside and made her move.
She snuck into a room with several
baby bottles full of a green formula.

Angelica knew time was short so
she filled her bag with bottles and snuck out.


Time skip to a park a short time after the
tour and her theft.
Angelica hid from the others ready to
enact her plans.

Angelica knew her moment had come.
She wastes little time and making sure
no one could see her begins sucking on
bottles of growth serum.
113232.title: Strange drink at a lab the family visited

choices: Angelica hides from her family to grow unaware of the G-Men
Men in black suits arrive at the park! Showdown!
1132323.content:
This was starting to take too long
though she risked being caught.

Angelica twists the cap off the 1st
baby bottle and gulps it down.
1 by 1 she uncaps and chugs the
bottles she stole from the lab.


Finally 3/4 of the way into bottle # 5
Angelica grabbed her stomach
with her free hand..


“Nnnn I -burp- don’t feel so good”

Suddenly her body glowed and another
strange feeling washed over her.

The ground began to get further away
and her shoes and socks became tight.
The rest of her clothes grew with her though
not quite as fast as the ground got
further away and her shoes burst.


A few minutes later and it stopped.
Her stomach felt better and the feelings
faded but now her socks pinched her feet.

She didn’t care though.

“It works it really works I’m talker
than mommy and daddy! Oh boy!
And there’s still more left!”

Angelica quickly downed the rest of
bottle # 5 then finished the
3 remaining bottles and just with
minutes to spare as a couple government
G-Men in black suits and SUV’s were
headed to track down the
Pickles family!


What next?
1132323.title: Fee Fi Foh Fum Angelica’s Rise

choices: The mistake begins! Angelica’s random growth spurts start!
113234.content:
Aliens had been secretly watching
Earth for awhile.
The aliens in question wanted to take
over the planet by way of
destruction however they’d rather not do
it themselves.



They needed the earthlings to do it
themselves which they were already
sort of destroying themselves but not
fast enough so a plan was hatched.


They just needed an Earthling that
wouldn’t care, that had violent tendencies,
the was destructive at times but yet could
be controlled.

They didn’t want an adult because that
could get dicey plus their experiment
worked better on younger test subjects
granted a human hadn’t yet been tried.


Then they spotted a certain bratty girl!
This Earth girl was named Angelica.
She’d just been punished by her
parents.


The aliens spotted opportunity knocking!
They beamed down invisibly to her home!
As soon as she was outside they
zapped her unseen by anyone without a
second thought!
They were so hasty they didn’t realize
they’d used a defective 1 shot prototype
Ray or look at the settings!


They quickly left then watched from afar.
113234.title: Aliens!

12523111.content:
Stu and Didi decided to once again attempt to take a vacation to the Grand Canyon with Tommy, and invited Susie to come along with them to keep Tommy company. As they set off, Susie and Tommy were seated next to each other in car seats.

"I'm sure glad my mommy and daddy invited you to go to the Graham Canyon with me." Tommy told Susie.

"Thanks, Tommy. Have you been to the Grand Canyon before?" Susie asked Tommy.

"Yes, I have, with Angelica. My daddy's car broke down there, but two nice men fixed it." Tommy told Susie.

Of course, what Tommy said wasn't entirely true; Angelica drew on Stu and Didi's road map, causing them to take a wrong turn and end up in Starvation Creek Road. Two crooked mechanics named Ace and Eddie deliberately dug a hole near their garage so they could fix Stu's car and scam him and Didi out of their money, but when Tommy and Angelica snuck into the garage to get Cynthia back, since Angelica left her there by mistake, they frightened Ace and Eddie, causing them to think the car is haunted and give Stu and Didi a free repair job. Of course, Susie didn't know this.

1331.title: The Other Babies Convince Him That Diapers Can ...

13311.content:
One day in Tommy's backyard, Tommy, Chuckie, Phil, Lil, and Kimi were all playing with Tommy's ball. They were having a good time tossing it to each other, when all of a sudden, Chuckie felt a strong urge to pee.

"What's wrong, Chuckie?" Tommy asked Chuckie.

"I gots to go potty!" said Chuckie.

"So go ahead and go. We'll be fine out here, won't we, guys?" Tommy asked Phil, Lil, and Kimi.

"Uh-huh." Phil, Lil, and Kimi all said in unison. Since Tommy, Phil, Lil, and Kimi all wore diapers, they didn't have to worry about having to stop playing to go potty.

"Thanks, guys." said Chuckie. He ran off to the bathroom, and was relieved to that the door was open and no one was inside. He also found his potty chair sitting next to the toilet. He pulled down his pants and underwear and sat down on the potty, sighing with relief as he peed in it. Soon, his bladder was empty and his potty was full. He emptied his potty into the toilet, flushed it, and washed his hands. When he got back outside, he felt unhappy, and Tommy was quick to notice.

"What's wrong, Chuckie?" Tommy asked Chuckie.

"You know, Tommy. You're real lucky. You don't have to worry about being potty-trained. You can just go potty whenever and wherever you want." Chuckie told Tommy, who felt confused.

"But I thought you liked being potty-trained." Tommy told Chuckie.

"I do. It's just... I wish I didn't have to stop playing with you guys so I can use the potty." Chuckie told Tommy.

"Well, maybe you don't, Chuckie. You're always welcome to go back to diapies." Kimi told Chuckie.

"Yeah, they're real soft and comforble." said Lil.

"They're easy to take off if you need a change." added Tommy.

"And bestest of all, if you have to go potty, you don't have to stop playing. You can just go in your diapie and keep playing." concluded Phil, then he sighed with relief as he wet his diaper. While Chuckie was disgusted by this, he knew his friends all had great points.

Does Chuckie go through with wanting to wear diapers again?
13311.title: Story 1

"Thanks, Tommy." said Chuckie. Tommy walked into his house and made his way up to his bedroom. He found his clean diapers on his changing table, and picked one up. He then made his way back outside.

Chas and Kira dropped Chuckie and Kimi off at Tommy's house while they went to work at Java Lava. Kimi noticed Chuckie looking upset.

"What's wrong, Chuckie?" Kimi asked Chuckie.

"You know, Kimi. You're real lucky. You still wear diapers and you don't have to worry about bein' potty-trained." Chuckie told Kimi.

"But Chuckie, I thought you liked bein' potty-trained." said Kimi.

"I do. It's just... I saw our mommy changing your diaper earlier today, and it made me think about what life was like afore' I was potty-trained. Whenever my daddy changed my diaper, he'd wipe my bottom clean, then he'd put a clean diaper on me. I can almost feel how soft and comforble diapers are." Chuckie told Kimi.

"They are soft and comforble, Chuckie." said Kimi.

"I know. Plus, you don't have to stop playin' if you have to go potty. You can just go in your diaper and keep playing. Now that I'm potty-trained, I can't do that anymore." Chuckie told Kimi.

"You know, if bein' potty-trained's not for you, you're always welcome to go back to wearing diapies." Kimi told Chuckie.

"Are you sure about this, Kimi?" Chuckie asked Kimi.

"Yeah, just think about it. I wear diapies, Tommy wears diapies, and Phil and Lil wear diapies, too. If you want to go back to wearing diapies, just talk to Tommy. He's your bestest friend and I'm sure he'll let you wear one of his diapies." Kimi told Chuckie.

133321111211112124112.content:
Chuckie was dreaming that he was walking along the edge of a river. He could hear the sound of a running waterfall in the distance, and it gave him the urge to pee. No matter which way he went, Chuckie got closer and closer to the waterfall. He soon reached the edge of the waterfall and looked down. He could see that all the water in the waterfall was falling into a giant potty chair that looked very much like his own. Chuckie's urge to pee was getting stronger and stronger, and Chuckie knew there was only one thing he could do; he had to pee in the giant potty. He remembered that he was still wearing the diaper that Tommy put on him underneath his pants. He pulled down his pants, then he untaped his diaper, but to his surprise, there was another diaper underneath that diaper. Then, when Chuckie untaped that diaper, there was another diaper underneath that diaper, and another, and another, and another. It seemed as no matter how many diapers Chuckie untaped, there was always another diaper underneath them.

It was at that point that Chuckie woke up, and looked under the covers. He saw that he was still wearing the diaper that Tommy put on him, and remembered that he left his pants and underwear in the playpen. Tommy and Kimi were still asleep.

Drew and Charlotte had to work, so Drew dropped Angelica off at Tommy's house on his way to work. Angelica was not looking forward to having to spend the day at her baby cousin's house, because she hated babies. One of the things she hated the most about them was the fact that they wore diapers and needed to be changed. She knew, however, that Chuckie was at least potty-trained and wore underwear, so admittedly that was the one thing she didn't hate about him. Fortunately for Chuckie, Angelica didn't notice he was wearing a diaper under his pants.

"Hi, Tommy. Hi, Chuckie." Angelica said unhappily.

"Hi, Angelica." said Tommy. Suddenly, Angelica sniffed.

"Somethin' smells like a dirty diaper, and baby powder!" said Angelica. Suddenly, Chuckie noticed that the dirty diaper balled up right next to him. He didn't want to tell Angelica that he pooped in the diaper and Tommy changed him, so he had to think of a lie.

"Oh. Well, that's because... Tommy's mommy just changed his diaper." Chuckie said to Angelica. This of course, wasn't true, but Chuckie didn't want Angelica to know that he was wearing a diaper underneath his pants. He knew she wouldn't stop teasing him for it if that was the case. Not wanting Angelica to tease Chuckie, Tommy decided to go along with it.

"Yeah, Angelica. My mommy just changed my diapie." said Tommy.

"Yeah? Well, she forgot to throw the dirty one away." said Angelica, noticing the dirty diaper between Tommy and Chuckie.

"Now get that out of here! It's makin' me sick!" said Angelica.

One day at the Finster household, Kira was putting a sweater on Fifi. Fifi didn't like wearing the sweater. She wimpered miserably as Kira put the sweater on her.

"Oh, now. Don't you look pretty?" Kira said as she pet Fifi's head.

"Yikes! Kira, what have you done to Fifi?" Chas asked Kira when he walked into the living room.

"Don't you think she looks cute?" Kira asked Chas.

"Oh, for goodness sake, she's a dog, Kira, not a... well, she is a poodle, so I guess that makes sense." Chas said. Fifi growled angrily as she pushed the sweater off.

"Good girl, Fifi." Chas said to Fifi. Kira, however, was less than pleased. She had spent a long time making the sweater, and Fifi didn't even want to wear it.

"Oh, fine, Fifi! If you want to run around naked all day, then go ahead!" Kira told Fifi angrily.

"Run, Fifi! Be free!" Chas told Fifi as she jumped into the playpen. Kimi was watching from inside the playpen and was impressed.

"Hey, you two! Come and listen to my speech, will you?" Marvin called to Chas and Kira from the kitchen.

"Oh, sure, Dad." Chas said as he and Kira walked into the kitchen. Kimi walked up to Fifi and was impressed when she found out she was naked.

"Wow, Fifi! I never noticed before! No wonder you're so happy all the time!" Kimi exclaimed, and she proceeded to undress herself.

14412.content:
While playing in the sandbox, Kimi finds a mysterious object poking out of the sand. Curious, she unearths it, and it turns out to be a transparent bottle with a cerulean liquid inside, labeled "JUMBO GROW". Kimi can't read the label, but the liquid inside looks nice and tasty, so down the hatch it goes.

How big does she get?
14412.title: Found this strange bottle called Jumbo Grow

144121.content:
As soon as she swallows the liquid, a sharp tingle starts welling inside her heart, and a wave of dizziness passes over her.

"I-I feel funny..." she mutters, wavering.

And then... she starts to grow. An inch at first, then two, then four, then ten, quickly sprouting up to a height of four feet. But it doesn't stop there. The world around her seems to shrink as she ascends past five feet, then six, then seven. Bigger and bigger, taller and taller, until she's big enough to cast a shadow over the entire sandbox she was playing in a moment before. Her growth finally tapers off at a towering ten feet, at which point she stumbles and falls on her butt, making the ground shake from the impact.

It is then that she hears one of the other children approaching her. Who is it?
144121.title: 10 feet

choices: Give her some of the Jumbo Grow so she can be big too
1441212.content:
Kimi turned around to find Angelica staring up at her, stunned into near speechlessness.

"B-b-big...b-b-baby..." she stammered.

Kimi giggled. "Pretty neat, huh?" she said, rising to her feet. "I found some special juice and I drinked some of it, and now I'm big, big, BIG!"

She jumped up and down in her excitement, making the ground shake.

What does Kimi do now?

144121222322112.content:
Tommy and Kimi wanted to have some fun with Angelica. They thought the best way to do that was to continue to spread the growth around, and create even more giant babies.

Phil, Lil, Chuckie and Dil were all playing in the sand box when it suddenly got dark. The sun had been blocked out by a couple of large shadows. They looked to see where the shadows were coming from, and we're surprised to see Tommy and Kimi towering over them. They all sat there in shock, unable to say anything, until Phil muttered a single "Wow!".

Finally Lil asked them how they got big, to which Kimi pulled out the bottle of Jumbro Grow. She then explained that she and Tommy wanted all of them to partake in the experience. "I don't know about dis guys", said Chuckie, "Dis looks scary." Tommy knew his friend all too well, so he decided to convince him. He reached down and held out his giant hand. "Get on Chuckie," Tommy said, "I wants to shows you sometin."

Chuckie was nervous, but trusted his friend and got on. Tommy slowly brought him up and placed him on his shoulder. Chuckie was amazed at how different everything looked up there. He could see so much more than he ever did at his normal height. "See Chuckie?" Tommy said, "There's no danger, only fun!"

"Yeah!" came a voice from behind them. Phil had already drank his share and was also 10 feet tall. "Dis is da kewlist! ting ever Chuckie!" "I have to agree with Phillip," said a now enlarged Lil as she made her way over, "this is fun!" Dil crawled over and giggled in agreement as he too was enjoying his new big body.

"Come 'big' brudur," said Kimi she rejoined the group, "It won't be as fun wit out you." Chuckie looked around at all the large faces of his sister and his friends. He then decided to.....

1451232.content:
It is nighttime and the sun has set, as a skunk wanders around the yard very quietly, scurrying through the bushes. Meanwhile, Stu, Lou, and Chas are also quietly wandering through the yard, with flashlights in their hands, trying to find the skunk.

"Careful Stu." Chas whispers into Stu's ear with concern.

"Don't worry, I know what I'm doing." Stu says quietly back, just as the skunk appears before them, in the beam of their flashlights.

"AAAHHH!" The men screamed in fear, as they quickly ran away from the skunk, and back inside the house.

"How did the skunk hunt go boys?" Didi asked, sitting at the kitchen table next to Kira.

"Not so good." Chas replied, taking a seat.

"These two panicked is what happened. Simple and pure fear. It was not a pretty sight Deed, let me tell ya." Lou added, also taking a seat at the table.

"What are you talking about Pop? You turned and ran with the rest of us." Stu commented, taking a seat across from Chas next to his father.

"Sure I did, what do you think I am, crazy? Fear is one of our basic strategies of basic survival." Lou commented.

choices: Chuckie Wakes Up From His Dream
1451322111.content:
Chuckie was about to leave after seeing how miserable Tommy's life was without him, but before he could say anything, his Guardian Angel interrupted him.

"Hold on, Chuckie, there's still one more baby we need to see." Chuckie's Guardian Angel told Chuckie.

"But Angel Guy, you already showed me what my daddy, Phil, Lil, and Tommy would be like if I was never borned. Who else could there possibly be?" Chuckie asked his Guardian Angel.

"Your little sister, Kimi." Chuckie's Guardian Angel told Chuckie.

"Oh." said Chuckie meekly. Chuckie's Guardian Angel took Chuckie to the EuroReptarLand theme park in Paris. In the theme park, Coco LaBouche was enjoying her new promotion as the head of the Reptar Corporation and her newfound wealth. She had so much money, she hardly knew what to do with it. Kira was still working for Coco, who had her do demeaning jobs like working at the Ooey Gooey World ride, where she got covered in slime, and at the P.U. Perfume Plant, testing deodorizers and foot powders on people with smelly armpits and smelly feet. Meanwhile, Kimi was being looked after in the daycare center, but she wasn't her usual happy-go-lucky self. She was on the verge of crying. Chuckie was quick to notice.

"That's my sister! But, Angel Guy, why does she look so sad?" Chuckie asked his Guardian Angel.

"Since you was never borned, Coco got her commotion as the head of the Reptar Corporation, and made Kimi's mommy work for her every hour of every day, so she never got to spend any time with her." Chuckie's Guardian Angel told Chuckie. Chuckie could see how sad Kimi was.

"Don't worry, Kimi. Your big brother's here." said Chuckie. He wanted to give her a hug, but it was no use. Since Chuckie didn't exist, his hug had no effect on Kimi.

"I don't like this, Angel Guy. Kimi's usually so happy!" Chuckie told his Guardian Angel.

"The only reason Kimi's so happy is because she gets to spend time with her mommy, but without you, Kimi's mommy didn't become your new mommy, and Kimi didn't become your sister." Chuckie's Guardian Angel told Chuckie. Chuckie couldn't take it anymore. Seeing his father, best friend, and little sister all so miserable made him realize that Angelica was wrong; the world was a better place when he existed.

"That's the last straw!" exclaimed Chuckie.

"What do you mean?" Chuckie's Guardian Angel asked Chuckie.

"I mean, I'm tired of livin' in a world without me!" said Chuckie.

"But Chuckie..." Chuckie's Guardian Angel started to say, but Chuckie interrupted him.

"Look, Angel, it's some guys' job to be tough, it's other guys' job to be strong, but me, I got a job that's just as important!" Chuckie said triumphantly.

"You mean?" Chuckie's Guardian Angel asked Chuckie.

"Yeah! I don't think running away is such a good idea! Angel Guy, take me home!" said Chuckie. Chuckie's Guardian Angel snapped his fingers and a cloud of dust filled the air.

One night, Tommy was tired of being a baby. He wanted to be able to do the things that older children do, like go to school, cross the street by himself, and play big kid games. As he went to bed that night, he saw a shooting star in the night sky.

"I wish I was older. I want to do the things that big kids do." said Tommy, then he fell asleep in his big boy bed. Early the next morning, when he woke up, he was older and taller. He was now eleven years old, and as a result, just barely fit in his big boy bed and his shirt and diaper got tighter. He also had a full head of purple hair.

"My wish came true, I'm a big boy now!" said Tommy in a deeper voice. He covered his mouth upon hearing his voice.

"Is that my voice? I didn't expect it to be so deep." said Tommy.

What happens next?

Tommy's amazement was cut short by his urge to pee. Now that he was eleven years old, Tommy knew that he could no longer use his diapers whenever he needed to pee like he did when he was one. Fortunately, now that he was older, he had the knowledge he needed to use the toilet whenever he had to pee, so he decided to do just that. He ran into the bathroom and closed the door. Then, he walked up to the toilet and untaped his diaper, letting it fall to the floor. Once his diaper was off, Tommy started peeing in the toilet. As he peed, he was amazed at how much liquid his new eleven-year-old bladder could hold. He continued to pee until at last, his bladder was empty. When he was all done, he flushed the toilet. Then he picked up his untaped diaper and taped it back onto his bottom. Since he had gotten older, his diaper had gotten a little tighter, so he taped it so it was just loose enough to fit him. After that, he went to the sink to wash his hands.

One day at Tommy Pickles' house, Tommy and Dil were playing in Tommy's bedroom, when Didi came to check on them. Around this time, Didi checked their diapers to see if they needed to be changed. At this time, both Tommy and Dil needed diaper changes. Didi decided to change Dil's diaper first, because Dil's diaper was both dirty and wet, whereas Tommy's diaper was only wet. Tommy knew that it sometimes took a while for Didi to change Dil's diaper. This was partially because Dil usually wore full-body pajamas over his diaper, whereas Tommy's diaper was usually exposed. Also, due to Dil's younger age, he wasn't able to eat solid food, so his diapers were usually much messier than Tommy's. On this particular day, Dil's diaper was especially messy, and it was going to take Didi several minutes to wipe Dil's bottom clean. Tommy began to itch, and he needed his diaper changed right now. Unfortunately for him, Didi was still busy wiping Dil's bottom clean.

"Sorry, Tommy. Mommy can't change you right now. You're going to have to wait" Didi told Tommy. Tommy didn't want to wait, as the longer he waited, the worse his diaper rash would become. Tommy looked over at his clean diapers on the bottom of the changing table, then he got an idea.

If Mommy won't change my diapie, I'll do it myself! How hard can it be? he thought. He picked up one of his clean diapers and held it between his head and chest. Then he untaped his wet diaper, sighing with relief as it fell to the floor. Didi was still too busy changing Dil's diaper, so she was unaware of what was going on not far away.

Kimi knew Tommy was looking at her privates,

He said, "Well, I kinda thought all us babies had one of these
little wiggly thingies 'tween our legs, but you don't. Instead,
there kinda looks like another butt. What is that?"

155122.title: Tommy and Chuckie.

1551221.title: Reader's Choice 1

155123.content: How about Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike?
155123.title: Any more.

choices: The Three Travel to a Dimension Where Dogs Act Like Humans
1551231.content: What adventure will Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike have?
1551231.title: Yes

15512311.content: How do they get there?
15512311.title: The Three Travel to a Dimension Where Dogs Act ...

155123111.content:
One day, Stu had built a new doghouse for Spike, and put it in Tommy's backyard. Unfortunately, this new doghouse didn't look very much like a doghouse at all. It looked more like a magic booth. Stu didn't question the design, he just thought this new doghouse looked like a high-tech model. Tommy and Chuckie were confused when they saw the new doghouse.

"Tommy, this is the strangest-looking doghouse I ever sawed. Are you sure your daddy built it right?" Chuckie asked Tommy.

"Of course, Chuckie. He's my daddy. He knows what he's doing." Tommy assured Chuckie.

"Well, Spike, what do you think of your new doghouse?" Tommy asked Spike. Spike wimpered unhappily.

"Maybe he just needs to look inside, Tommy." suggested Chuckie.

"Good idea, Chuckie." said Tommy. The two toddlers pushed Spike into the new doghouse, and when they went inside, they fell through a dimensional tunnel. When they reached the other end of the tunnel, they were in a strange city where dogs acted like humans; they stood upright, wore clothes, and spoke English.

In this dimension, did Spike stand upright and speak English?
155123111.title: One of Stu's Inventions

choices: A Police Dog Comes Across Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike
1551231111.content:
"Tommy, I don't think we're in your house no mores." Chuckie told Tommy.

"You're right, Chuckie. This place looks really strange." added Tommy as he and Chuckie walked around the strange new city.

"This is my kind of place. I could really dig being here." Spike said as he walked upright behind Tommy and Chuckie. The two toddlers stopped and turned around when they heard Spike talk.

"Spike, you can talk!" exclaimed Tommy.

"Of course I can, I always could. You just never understood what I was saying." Spike told Tommy and Chuckie.

"That's because it always came out like 'Woof! Woof! Ruff! Arf!'." Tommy told Spike.

"Hey, you speak dog pretty good!" Spike told Tommy.

"This is getting too weird for me." said Chuckie. Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike looked around. Everywhere in this dimension, all the dogs were standing upright and wearing clothes.

"Wow, Chuckie, all the peoples here are dogs!" Tommy told Chuckie.

"Only they're all wearing clothes like peoples!" added Chuckie.

"Except for me, I feel so naked!" Spike said as he blushed and covered his naked body with his front paws.

What happens next?
1551231111.title: Yes

15512311111.content:
Just then, a Police Dog passed by Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike.

"Afternoon, gentlemen." said the Police Dog.

"Hi!" Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike said simultaneously.

How did the Police Dog react to seeing humans in his dimension?
15512311111.title: A Police Dog Comes Across Tommy, Chuckie, and S...

choices: Spike Runs into a Kindly Sheriff Dog
155123111111.content:
When the Police Dog saw Tommy and Chuckie, he was shocked. He blew his whistle.

"What's wrong, Officer?" Spike asked the Police Dog.

"Your human friends there don't have a collar or license, and they're not on leashes. Unlicensed humans are illegal in this city, so I'm afraid I'm going to have to take your friends to the Human Pound!" the Police Dog told Spike.

"Run, Tommy, run!" Chuckie told Tommy. Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike all ran away.

"Come back here!" said the Police Dog, and he chased after them.

What happens next?
155123111111.title: Shocked

1551231111111.content:
As Tommy and Chuckie continued to run from the Police Dog, Spike came across a Sheriff Dog.

"Hold on there, son." said the Sheriff Dog, and Spike stopped to talk to him.

"You'll be in a heap of trouble if that Police Dog catches you with those humans." the Sheriff Dog told Spike.

"I know, but they're my best friends! I can't let anything bad happen to them!" Spike told the Sheriff Dog.

"I appreciate your enthusiasm, but in this city, it's every dog for himself." the Sheriff Dog told Spike. Meanwhile, Tommy and Chuckie continued to run away from the Police Dog. Chuckie was beginning to get tired from running.

"Tommy, we can't just keep running. I'm getting tired! We gotta find someplace to hide!" Chuckie told Tommy.

"You might be right, Chuckie. I'm beginning to feel a little tired myself." Tommy said in agreement.

Where did Tommy and Chuckie hide?
1551231111111.title: Spike Runs into a Kindly Sheriff Dog

15512311111111.content:
Tommy and Chuckie came across a Dog Groomer's shop. They decided to hide there. Inside the Dog Groomer's Shop, a Poodle was giving another dog a fur cut.

"Darling, I simply can't do a thing with your dull and lifeless fur." the Poodle said to her customer. Suddenly, Tommy and Chuckie ran past her.

"Gracious! Humans!" the Poodle said, and the Dog Customer stared in shock, causing her fur to frizz up.

"Ah, that's more like it!" said the Poodle as she began cutting the Dog Customer's fur. Just then, the Police Dog came in.

"Excuse me, ladies. Have you seen two humans?" the Police Dog asked the Poodle and the Dog Customer.

"Yes, they just ran right past us." the Poodle told the Police Dog.

"Thank you. I hope you don't mind the routine search." said the Police Dog.

"Not at all. The sooner we are rid of those humans, the better." said the Poodle.

Where did Tommy and Chuckie hide?
15512311111111.title: A Dog Groomer's Shop

155123111111111.content:
Tommy and Chuckie came across a barrel of dog fur.

"Quick, Tommy! Let's hide in here!" said Chuckie.

"Good idea, Chuckie." said Tommy, and the two toddlers climbed into the barrel. Just then, the Police Dog came to the barrel. Fortunately, he didn't know Tommy and Chuckie were in it.

"Where are you? Come out, come out, wherever you are!" said the Police Dog.

Did the Police Dog find Tommy and Chuckie in the barrel?
155123111111111.title: A Barrel of Dog Fur

1551231111111111.content: What gave Tommy and Chuckie away?
1551231111111111.title: Yes

15512311111111111.content:
All of a sudden, Chuckie sneezed. The Police Dog heard his sneeze.

"Aha!" exclaimed the Police Dog. He ran over to the barrel and pulled Tommy and Chuckie out by their shirts.

"Now I've got you! You two are going to the Human Pound now!" said the Police Dog.

"Sorry, Tommy. I couldn't help it. The fur was tickling my nose." Chuckie told Tommy.

"I know, Chuckie." said Tommy sadly. The Police Dog took Tommy and Chuckie to the Human Pound, and locked them up in a cell. Chuckie was feeling particularly miserable.

"I'm scared, Tommy." Chuckie told Tommy.

"Don't worry, Chuckie. Our mommies and daddies will find us." Tommy assured Chuckie, trying to cheer him up.

"How, Tommy? They don't know where we are!" Chuckie reminded Tommy.

"You're right, Chuckie. We don't even know where we are!" said Tommy.

"We're doomed! Doomed! Doomed, I tell you!" moaned Chuckie. Suddenly, Tommy got an idea on how he and Chuckie were going to break out.

"Wait a minute, Chuckie! Why didn't I think of it before? I'll just use my studriver to break us out!" Tommy exclaimed, and he checked his diaper.

Did Tommy find his screwdriver in his diaper?
15512311111111111.title: Chuckie's Sneeze

155123111111111112.content:
To Tommy's horror, his diaper was empty and his screwdriver wasn't in it.

"Oh no! Chuckie! My studriver must have fallen out of my diapie when we were running from that Police Dog!" exclaimed Tommy.

"See, Tommy, I told you! We're doomed!" Chuckie told Tommy.

"Not yet, we're not. The Police Dog didn't catch Spike. Once Spike finds out we're in trouble, he'll come to save us!" Tommy told Chuckie. Meanwhile, Spike was still talking to the Sheriff Dog.

"My friends and I will be safe in our own dimension. If we can just find that magic doghouse, we can get back there." Spike told the Sheriff Dog.

"Why would you want to risk your life for a couple of humans, anyway?" the Sheriff Dog asked Spike.

"Haven't you ever heard the saying, 'A dog's best friend is his human'?" Spike asked the Sheriff Dog.

"Nope, can't say that I have." said the Sheriff Dog. Just then, a news report came on television.

"You're watching DNN. Dog News Network." the Announcer said.

"This just in. Two human toddlers have been apprehended at the Dog Groomer's and imprisoned in the Human Pound, where they have been given a life sentence; approximately ten to thirteen years." said the Dog Newscaster as mugshots of Tommy and Chuckie appeared onscreen.

"Oh no! Those are my friends!" exclaimed Spike.

"These two human toddlers were previously seen alongside a rare Siberian Tiger Hound with no clothes on. If you see this dog, please call the number on your screen." the Dog Newscaster said as mugshots of Spike and the number to the News Station appeared onscreen.

"Oh no, now I'm an accomplice to them!" exclaimed Spike.

Does the Dog Sheriff decide to help Spike rescue Tommy and Chuckie?
155123111111111112.title: No

1551231111111111121.content:
The Sheriff Dog decided to help Spike rescue his friends so they could return to their own dimension.

"Don't worry, Spike. I promise not to turn you in. Now, you stay right here, and I'll go to the Tailor Shop to get you some clothes. That way, the other dogs won't recognize you." the Sheriff Dog told Spike.

"Thanks." Spike told the Sheriff Dog.

"While you're there, could you get me a red dress, a pearl necklace, a pair of green glasses, and a red trident wig?" Spike asked the Sheriff Dog.

"Why those clothes?" the Sheriff Dog asked Spike.

"You'll see." Spike told the Sheriff Dog. Soon, the Sheriff Dog came back with the clothes Spike asked for. When Spike put them on, he looked just like Didi.

"Thanks, I owe you one." Spike said, and he left the Sheriff Dog's office.

"Good luck!" the Sheriff Dog said as he waved goodbye to Spike.

Did the other dogs recognize Spike in his disguise?
1551231111111111121.title: Yes

choices: A Disguised Spike Comes to Rescue Tommy and Chuckie
15512311111111111212.content:
Spike came across the Police Dog again. Fortunately for him, the Police Dog didn't recognize him in his disguise.

"Excuse me, Ma'am. I'm looking for this dog. Have you seen him?" the Police Dog asked Spike as he held up a mugshot of Spike.

"Nope, can't say that I have." Spike said in a falsetto voice.

"Thank you, Ma'am. If you do see him, please inform me, okay?" asked the Police Dog.

"Yes, Sir." Spike said in a falsetto voice.

"Have a nice day." the Police Dog said, and he walked away. Just then, Spike came across Tommy's screwdriver.

"Tommy's screwdriver! He must have dropped it running from that Police Dog!" Spike exclaimed as he picked it up. Suddenly, he had an idea. Meanwhile, in the Human Pound, the Dog Warden brought Tommy and Chuckie their lunch.

"Okay, prisoners! Lunch time!" said the Dog Warden. Tommy and Chuckie were excited when they heard this, as they hadn't eaten anything since breakfast. To their horror, the Dog Warden served them bowls of dog food. Tommy and Chuckie had eaten dog food once before on Tommy's first birthday, and they found it tasted terrible.

"But this is dog food!" exclaimed Chuckie.

"Of course it is. That's all we serve here." said the Dog Warden.

"But we want real food, like cookies, cake, ice cream, and gummi bears!" Tommy told the Dog Warden.

"Tough. You'll eat your food and like it!" the Dog Warden told Tommy and Chuckie.

What happens next?
15512311111111111212.title: No

155123111111111112121.content:
Suddenly, the disguised Spike came in, carrying a cake.

"Please, Sir, may I speak to the prisoners?" Spike asked the Dog Warden in a falsetto voice.

"Who are you?" asked the Dog Warden.

"I'm just an innocent lady who feels sorry for them." Spike told the Dog Warden in a falsetto voice.

Does the Dog Warden allow Spike to talk to Tommy and Chuckie?
155123111111111112121.title: A Disguised Spike Comes to Rescue Tommy and Chu...

1551231111111111121211.content:
The Dog Warden allowed Spike to talk to Tommy and Chuckie.

"Go ahead, you've got three minutes." the Dog Warden told Spike, and he left.

"Are you who I think you are?" Tommy asked the disguised Spike.

"How do you like my disguise?" Spike asked Tommy as he removed his glasses.

"Spike! You've come to save..." Chuckie began to exclaim, but Tommy clamped his hand over Chuckie's mouth.

"Shhh! Not so loud, Chuckie! That mean dog might hear us!" Tommy told Chuckie.

"Sorry, Tommy." said Chuckie in a muffled voice.

"I brought you this cake." Spike told Tommy and Chuckie.

"Thanks, Spike." Tommy said, and he and Chuckie began to eat the cake. To their relief, they found Tommy's screwdriver stashed inside it.

"My studriver! You found it! Now we can get out of here!" exclaimed Tommy. Then, Spike noticed the two full bowls of dog food.

"Aren't you boys going to eat your lunch?" Spike asked Tommy and Chuckie.

"No thanks, Spike. You're welcome to have them, though." Chuckie told Spike.

"There's no accounting for taste." Spike said, then he gobbled up Tommy and Chuckie's dog food. Tommy began to pick the lock on his cell with his screwdriver.

Did Tommy succeed in unlocking the door before the Dog Warden returned?
1551231111111111121211.title: Yes

15512311111111111212111.content:
"Almost... got it!" said Tommy as he unlocked the door to his cell. As soon as the door was open, an alarm sounded. The Dog Warden heard the alarm.

"What the... it's a jailbreak! The prisoners are getting away!" the Dog Warden exclaimed.

"Come on, Spike, we gots to get out of here and back home!" Tommy told Spike as he stashed his screwdriver into his diaper, and he and Chuckie ran off.

"Right behind you, Tommy!" said Spike as he followed behind them. Suddenly, he heard a voice.

"Stop! Come back here!" said the Dog Warden as he chased after Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike.

"Uh-oh! That mean dog is after us!" yelled Chuckie.

"Not if I can help it!" said Spike. He removed his disguise and tossed it on the floor behind him. The Dog Warden tripped on the disguise and fell.

"Ouch! Looks like I'm gonna have to call for backup!" said the Dog Warden. He pulled out his radio and spoke into it.

"That strange dog helped the prisoners escape! Send backup!" the Dog Warden said in his radio.

"Did we lose em, Spike?" Tommy asked Spike, who looked behind himself.

"Yep. Shook em' off like a swarm of fleas." Spike told Tommy and Chuckie. Suddenly, Chuckie looked back and screamed in horror.

"What's wrong, Chuckie?" asked Tommy.

"The mean dogs are right behind us!" exclaimed Chuckie. Sure enough, the Police Dog was in a police car with the siren flashing.

"Calling all cars, officer in pursuit of the escaped humans and the fugitive dog! Send backup!" said the Police Dog.

"They're still on our tail! At least mine!" Spike said as he, Tommy, and Chuckie ran for their lives. Soon, a whole trail of police cars were following them.

"We gots to find that magic doghouse and get out of here!" Tommy told Chuckie and Spike.

Did Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike find the magic booth?
15512311111111111212111.title: Yes

155123111111111112121111.content:
Suddenly, Chuckie saw the magic booth.

"Tommy, Spike, look!" Chuckie exclaimed as he pointed at the magic booth.

"Well done, Chuckie! Let's get out of here!" Tommy told Chuckie.

"Home sweet home!" Spike said as he, Tommy, and Chuckie ran into the magic booth. Suddenly, the Police Dog caught up to them.

"I've got you now!" the Police Dog said as he swung a leash in the air like a lasso. The magic booth disappeared just in time.

"Drat! You may have escaped this time, but we'll meet again, and when we do, you'll all be my prisoners!" the Police Dog said as he shook his fist in anger. Inside the magic booth, Tommy, Chuckie, and Spike fell through the dimensional tunnel. They soon ended up back in Tommy's backyard.

"Chuckie, we're back home again!" Tommy told Chuckie.

"Boy, am I glad!" exclaimed Chuckie. Suddenly, Stu went outside, carrying Spike's new doghouse. He saw the booth, unaware of how magical it was.

"Oh, there it is. I must have followed the wrong blueprints. Here's Spike's real doghouse." Stu said as he put the new doghouse down. He then picked up the magic booth and wondered what he was going to do with it.

Were Phil and Lil also in Tommy's backyard?
155123111111111112121111.title: Yes

1551231111111111121211111.content:
"Tommy! Chuckie! There you are!" exclaimed Phil.

"Where have you guys been?" Lil asked Tommy and Chuckie.

"You won't believe where we went! When we went into that magic doghouse, we landed in a city where all the dogs could talk, walk on two feet, and wore clothes!" Tommy told the twins.

"But then it gotted scary! A mean dog caught us and took us to the human pound!" added Chuckie.

"But then Spike saved us and brought us back home!" continued Tommy.

"Yeah, Spike was real cool in that city! He could walk and talk!" Chuckie told the twins.

"Really?" asked Lil.

"Yeah, show em' Spike! Say something!" Tommy told Spike.

Could Spike still talk even though he was back in his own dimension?
1551231111111111121211111.title: Yes

15512311111111111212111112.content:
Spike just barked. Tommy and Chuckie gasped.

"But that's impossible! Spike was talking afore!" Chuckie told Phil and Lil.

"I think you guys have been watching too many cartoons." Lil told Tommy and Chuckie.

"Yeah. Well, me and Lil are gonna go play in the mud now." Phil told Tommy and Chuckie, and he and Lil left.

"I guess Spike can only talk when he's in Dog City." Chuckie told Tommy.

"Yeah. That's too bad, though. I wish he could talk." Tommy said as he gave Spike a hug.

Me, too. So I can tell them how much I missed my old doghouse! thought Spike.

THE END
15512311111111111212111112.title: No

15512321112.content: Was it in Tommy's parents' bedroom?

155123211121.title: Yes

1551232111211.content: It was Tommy. Did he go through the mirror because he wanted to go to Mirrorland again?
1551232111211.title: Tommy

15512321112111.content:
Tommy remembered how much fun he had last time he went to Mirrorland, and he wanted to go there again. He backed up and charged at the mirror, going through it. Kimi followed behind him, as she wanted to go to Mirrorland as well. Chuckie didn't really want to go to Mirrorland, but he also didn't want anything bad to happen to his best friend or his little sister, so he went in after them. On the other side of the mirror was a strange land populated entirely by babies.

What did Tommy, Kimi, and Chuckie do first?
15512321112111.title: Yes

155123211121111.content: Did they take a look around?
155123211121111.title: Reader's Choice 1

1551232111211112.content: Did one of the babies who lived there walk up to them?
1551232111211112.title: Something else

15512321112111121.content: Was the baby who walked up to them a boy or a girl?
15512321112111121.title: Yes

155123211121111211.content: It was a boy. What did he say?
155123211121111211.title: A Boy

1551232111211112111.content:
"Hello, welcome to Babyland. My name is Chandler." said the baby boy.

"Hi, Chandler. My name's Tommy. This is my bestest friend, Chuckie, and this is his little sister, Kimi." Tommy told Chandler.

"Nice to meet you all." Chandler told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi.

"What's Babyland like?" Kimi asked Chandler.

"Here at Babyland, everyone here is under the age of three, and we can do whatever we want." Chandler told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. Many baby girls and boys walked up to him.

What happens next?
1551232111211112111.title: Welcome

15512321112111121111.content: Will Chandler give Tommy, Chuckie and Kimi a tour of Babyland?
15512321112111121111.title: Reader's Choice 1

155123211121111211111.content:
"Come on, guys, I'll give you a tour of Babyland." Chandler told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi, and they all followed behind him.

Where does Chandler begin?
155123211121111211111.title: Yes

choices: Tommy and Kimi Play on the Playground
Tommy and Kimi Continue Chandler's Tour
1551232111211112111111.content:
Chandler took Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi to a massive maze of swings, slides, and jungle gyms, which was the first stop on their tour.

"Here is the playground." Chandler told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. Tommy and Kimi both gasped in amazement and even Chuckie had to admit the playground looked really fun, although he was rather skeptical about playing on it, due in part to having a bad experience with a really tall slide at the Pizza Puppet Place.

Do Tommy and Kimi decide to play in the playground, or do they continue to let Chandler give them a tour of Babyland?
1551232111211112111111.title: The Playground

1551232111211112111112.content: Was it a kindly robot that changed other babies' diapers?
1551232111211112111112.title: Somewhere Else

15512321112111121111121.content:
Chandler took Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi to a robot that was changing other babies' diapers.

"This is Nanny-Bot. She's a kindly robot who changes diapers whenever a baby needs a change." Chandler told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. The three toddlers approached Nanny-Bot.

"Hi, Nanny-Bot. I'm Tommy. This is my bestest friend, Chuckie, and this is his little sister, Kimi." Tommy told Nanny-Bot.

"Nice to meet you, Tommy, Kimi, and Chuckie. I am Nanny-Bot. Please hold still." Nanny-Bot told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. She then scanned the toddlers to see if any of them needed a diaper change.

Who needed a new diaper?
15512321112111121111121.title: Yes

155123211121111211111211.content:
Tommy needed to be changed, as he had a full diaper.

"Okay, Tommy. Let's get that diaper off." Nanny-Bot told Tommy. Tommy lay down and pulled up his shirt, and Nanny-Bot got to work untaping Tommy's dirty diaper.

"You guys continue the tour without me. I'll catch up." Tommy told Chuckie, Kimi, and Chandler.

"Okay, Tommy." Chandler told Tommy, and he, Chuckie, and Kimi left to give Tommy some privacy as Nanny-Bot changed his diaper.

Who do we follow?
155123211121111211111211.title: Tommy

1551232111211112111112111.content: Upon having his diaper removed, did Tommy have to pee?
1551232111211112111112111.title: Tommy

15512321112111121111121111.content:
As Nanny-Bot changed Tommy's diaper, Tommy started to pee. Fortunately for him, Nanny-Bot had an empty bottle on hand. She caught Tommy's pee in it, so that she could dispose of it after she was finished changing him.

"I'm sorry, Nanny-Bot." Tommy said to Nanny-Bot as he blushed in embarrassment.

"It's okay, Tommy. Accidents happen." Nanny-Bot assured Tommy.

Did Nanny-Bot put a clean diaper on Tommy?
15512321112111121111121111.title: Yes

155123211121111211111211112.content: Did Nanny-Bot let Tommy walk around diaperless?
155123211121111211111211112.title: No

1551232111211112111112111121.content:
Nanny-Bot decided to let Tommy walk around without a diaper on his bottom, as the less time a baby is in a diaper, the less likely they are to develop diaper rash.

Did Tommy take off his shirt as well?
1551232111211112111112111121.title: Yes

15512321112111121111121111211.content: Did Tommy ask if it was okay to go naked in Babyland?
15512321112111121111121111211.title: Yes

choices: Went to Find Chuckie, Kimi, and Chandler
155123211121111211111211112111.content:
"Excuse me, Miss Nanny-Bot, is it okay for me to be nakie in Babyland?" Tommy asked Nanny-Bot.

"Of course it is. Here in Babyland, babies can do whatever they want. If they don't want to wear clothes, they don't have to. There's even a place in Babyland where babies can run around naked and free whenever they want." Nanny-Bot told Tommy.

"Thank you." said Tommy. He then stood up, pulled his shirt up over his head, and tossed it aside. He was now naked.

What did Tommy do next?
155123211121111211111211112111.title: Yes

choices: Kimi Decides to Join Tommy in Being Naked
155123211121111211111211112111111.content:
"Hi, guys. I'm back." Tommy said to Chuckie, Kimi, and Chandler when he caught up to them. They were all surprised when they saw Tommy naked.

"Tommy, why are you nakie?" Kimi asked Tommy.

"Nanny-Bot decided to let me run around nakie." Tommy told his friends.

"But Tommy, don't you remember? The last time you went nakie, you got into trouble." Chuckie reminded Tommy.

"Yeah, but this is different, Chuckie. Here in Babyland, babies are allowed to do whatever they want. There's even a place where they can run around nakie and free." Tommy told Chuckie.

Kimi managed to take her boots and socks off with no problems.

1551232111211112111112111121111111212.content:
Kimi untaped her diaper, sighing with relief as it fell to the ground. Then she pulled her dress up over her head and tossed it aside. She was now naked, just like Tommy.

What happens next?

1551232111211112121.content:
"Welcome to Babyland! My name is Erin." The baby girl said.

"Hi, Erin. My name's Tommy. This is my bestest friend, Chuckie, and this is his little sister, Kimi." Tommy told Erin.

"Nice to meet you all." Erin told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi.

"What's Babyland like?" Kimi asked Erin.

"Here at Babyland, everyone here is under the age of three, and we can do whatever we want." Erin told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. Many baby girls and boys walked up to her.

What happens next?
1551232111211112121.title: Welcome

choices: Tommy and Kimi Play on the Playground
Tommy and Kimi Continue Erin's Tour
1551232111211112121111211.content:
Erin took Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi to a massive maze of swings, slides, and jungle gyms, which was the first stop on their tour.

"Here is the playground." Erin told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. Tommy and Kimi both gasped in amazement and even Chuckie had to admit the playground looked really fun, although he was rather skeptical about playing on it, due in part to having a bad experience with a really tall slide at the Pizza Puppet Place.

Do Tommy and Kimi decide to play in the playground, or do they continue to let Erin give them a tour of Babyland?
1551232111211112121111211.title: A playground

1551232111211112121111212.content: Was it a kindly robot that changed other babies' diapers?
1551232111211112121111212.title: Somewhere else

15512321112111121211112121.content:
Erin took Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi to a robot that was changing other babies' diapers.

"This is Nanny-Bot. She's a kindly robot who changes diapers whenever a baby needs a change." Erin told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. The three toddlers approached Nanny-Bot.

"Hi, Nanny-Bot. I'm Tommy. This is my bestest friend, Chuckie, and this is his little sister, Kimi." Tommy told Nanny-Bot.

"Nice to meet you, Tommy, Kimi, and Chuckie. I am Nanny-Bot. Please hold still." Nanny-Bot told Tommy, Chuckie, and Kimi. She then scanned the toddlers to see if any of them needed a diaper change.

Who needed a new diaper?
15512321112111121211112121.title: Yes

155123211121111212111121211.content:
Tommy needed to be changed, as he had a full diaper.

"Okay, Tommy. Let's get that diaper off." Nanny-Bot told Tommy. Tommy lay down and pulled up his shirt, and Nanny-Bot got to work untaping Tommy's dirty diaper.

"You guys continue the tour without me. I'll catch up." Tommy told Chuckie, Kimi, and Erin.

"Okay, Tommy." Erin told Tommy, and she, Chuckie, and Kimi left to give Tommy some privacy as Nanny-Bot changed his diaper.

Who do we follow?
155123211121111212111121211.title: Tommy

1551232111211112121111212111.content: Upon having his diaper removed, did Tommy have to pee?
1551232111211112121111212111.title: Tommy

15512321112111121211112121111.content:
As Nanny-Bot changed Tommy's diaper, Tommy started to pee. Fortunately for him, Nanny-Bot had an empty bottle on hand. She caught Tommy's pee in it, so that she could dispose of it after she was finished changing him.

"I'm sorry, Nanny-Bot." Tommy said to Nanny-Bot as he blushed in embarrassment.

"It's okay, Tommy. Accidents happen." Nanny-Bot assured Tommy.

Did Nanny-Bot put a clean diaper on Tommy?
15512321112111121211112121111.title: Yes

15512321112111121211112121111211.title: Yes
